'''sapuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiaoruan|xiaoruan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiaoruan|xiaoruan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sapuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæpikith|sæpikith]] || [[word:sæpikij|sæpikij]] || [[word:sæpikish|sæpikish]] || [[word:sæpiki|sæpiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapupukuth|sapupukuth]] || [[word:sapupukuj|sapupukuj]] || [[word:sapupukush|sapupukush]] || [[word:sapupuku|sapupuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sapukuth|sapukuth]] || [[word:sapukuj|sapukuj]] || [[word:sapukush|sapukush]] || [[word:sapuku|sapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapufkuth|sapufkuth]] || [[word:sapufkuj|sapufkuj]] || [[word:sapufkush|sapufkush]] || [[word:sapufkuf|sapufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sapukuthu|sapukuthu]] || [[word:sapukuju|sapukuju]] || [[word:sapukushu|sapukushu]] || [[word:sapukuku|sapukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sapukuth|sapukuth]] || [[word:sapukuj|sapukuj]] || [[word:sapukush|sapukush]] || [[word:sapuku|sapuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sapukuthul|sapukuthul]] || [[word:sapukujul|sapukujul]] || [[word:sapukushul|sapukushul]] || [[word:sapukukul|sapukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sapukuthuthu|sapukuthuthu]] || [[word:sapukujuju|sapukujuju]] || [[word:sapukushushu|sapukushushu]] || [[word:sapukuku|sapukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sapukuthun|sapukuthun]] || [[word:sapukujun|sapukujun]] || [[word:sapukushun|sapukushun]] || [[word:sapukukun|sapukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sapukuthuoro|sapukuthuoro]] || [[word:sapukujuoro|sapukujuoro]] || [[word:sapukushuoro|sapukushuoro]] || [[word:sapukukuoro|sapukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
